es.name: Calculadora de Regla de Tres
es.desc: Resuelve proporciones directas: si a es a b como c es a x, calcula x.
es.description: Resuelve proporciones directas: si a es a b como c es a x, calcula x.
es.seo_title: Calculadora de Regla de Tres Simple Online
es.seo_description: Resuelve la regla de tres simple al instante. Si A→B entonces C→X. Calcula proporciones directas gratis. Con ejemplos resueltos.
es.example_label: If 7.5kg of materials cost $22.50, find the cost of 12.8kg using direct proportion

range_hints.b: Corresponds to a; same magnitude range
range_hints.c: The known value to find equivalent for; any magnitude

es.result_context: The result x ({x}) is the unknown fourth value in the proportion a:b :: c:x, solving for equivalent ratios in direct proportion problems.

steps.description: Set up proportion: 7.5 is to 22.5 as 12.8 is to x

mistakes: Setting up the proportion incorrectly (wrong position of values)
Not ensuring the relationship is truly proportional before applying
Dividing by a when a equals zero, causing calculation error
